description: Product description Basic Hair Elastics Bobbles Hair Bands Ponytail Holders Hair Styling Accessory Various Colors and sizes of the wrapped elastic rubber hair band are good hairdressers for women. You can use it to make a ponytail holder. Stretchy rubber can adjust the extent between loose or tight, then make a variety of hairstyles A hair tie ponytail holder, hair band, hair elastic, wrap-around, gogo, bobble used to fasten hair, particularly long hair, away from areas such as the face. This is usually done as part of a hairstyle such as pigtails, bunches, or ponytails for straight, wavy, and loosely curled hair, and referred to as afro puffs, bunny tails, and the elastic. can also include a fixed tie or rubber band which is placed through or around strands to hold specific parts of hair together, rather than tie it or clasp it together like a hair clip.
